title: Canting system of hand-drawn batik machine
abstract: This invention relates to canting system of hand drawn batik machine, the disposal of malam or paraffin or wax from canting results by gravitation through a gap between a wax stopper (4) and a nozzle (3). The system consist of: a nozzle (3) for wax disposal, a wax stopper (4) inside the nozzle for holding the wax disposal when the nozzle has no pressure from outside or fabric and for allowing disposal when the wax stopper has a pressure from outside or fabric, a nozzle bolt (5) for installing the nozzle on the canting tip, and a nozzle lock (6) for tightening the bolt and preventing the wax from leaking, a heating element (7) wrapped around the canting tube (1) for melting the wax and maintain the wax temperature, a temperature sensor (8) or thermocouple installed in the canting tube for wax temperature detection inside the tube, a temperature controller and monitor (9) connected with heating element (7) and temperature sensor (8), for displaying and controlling the wax temperature.
claims: Claims Claim 1. A hand drawn batik machine system, characterized by mechanism of malam or paraffin or wax disposal on canting machine due to gravitation through a gap between wax stopper that is depressed by fabric during batik processes. 2. D hand drawn batik machine system as claim 1, that the wax stopper closes the nozzle hole due to density and gravity and wax flow out from nozzle when the wax stopper is depressed by fabric during batik processes. 3. A hand drawn batik machine system as claim 1, consists of: - a canting (1) that has tube shaped as wax container; - a nozzle (3) for wax disposal; - a wax stopper (4) to control wax disposal; - a nozzle bolt (5) for installing the nozzle on canting tip; - a nozzle lock (6) for tightening the bolt and prevent the wax from leaking; - a heating element (7) that wrapped around the canting tube for melting the wax and maintaining the wax temperature; a temperature sensor or thermocouple (8) that is installed in canting tube for wax temperature detection; - a temperature controller and monitor (9) that connected with heating element (7) and temperature sensor (8), for temperature wax display and controlling temperature to follow the set point temperature. 4. A hand drawn batik machine system as claim 3, where the all components are made with hard materials, more preferable copper or steel or other metals that are able to hold the wax and transfer the heat for wax melting processes. 5. A hand drawn batik machine system as claim 3, where the solid wax stopper (4) is made with hard materials, more preferable copper or steel or other metals, with weight 0,01-10 gram, it has tapered (cone) shaped but has not sharp tip, to avoid tearing the fabric, that has the diameter between 0,05-10 mm and the length as needed uses to control wax disposal.
